items.name: Depreciation
items.summary: Spreading an asset's cost over its useful life.
items.content: Depreciation allocates the cost of a tangible asset over its useful life. Non-cash expense: reduces reported profit without touching cash flow. Straight-line vs declining balance change the timing, not the total.

items.name: Walk-forward validation
items.summary: Time-series cross-validation that never looks into the future.
items.content: Walk-forward validation trains on a rolling historical window and tests on the next period, mimicking live deployment. Prevents lookahead leakage that ordinary k-fold introduces on time series.
